headline: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conference
summary: LOWELL, Ark., March 04, 2026--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc.’s (NASDAQ: JBHT) Executive Vice President and President of Intermodal Darren Field and Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President of Finance Brad Delco will address the J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference in Washington, D.C., at 9:30 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, March 17, 2026.

headline: A Look At J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Event context and recent performance J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) has attracted investor attention after a recent period of strong share price moves, with the stock up about 14% over the past month and 23% in the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for J.B. Hunt Transport Services. Set against a recent share price of US$230.87, J.B. Hunt Transport Services shows building momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 13.89% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 48.09% contrasting...
